CustomField.description: Used in SMS Mogli flow scheduled path to time the SMS Message to provide information about returning the device to Huxley Medical 14 days after the Study's Expected Study Date (datetime) https://basecamp.com/2583453/projects/19794483/todos/515688158
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used in SMS Mogli flow scheduled path to time the SMS Message to provide information about returning the device to Huxley Medical 14 days after the Study's Expected Study Date (datetime) https://basecamp.com/2583453/projects/19794483/todos/515688158
CustomField.label: Study Follow Up: 14 Days
